company_summary: Zoox is an Amazon-owned autonomous vehicle company building a purpose-built robotaxi — not a converted car — designed from the ground up for passengers. They are actively operating in Las Vegas and San Francisco with Austin and Miami expansions coming soon. Their trajectory is commercial robotaxi deployment at scale.
